description: Aftertreatment NOx sensor - voltage below normal
recommended_action: Replace outlet NOx sensor; run forced DPF regen

description: DPF soot load above critical threshold
recommended_action: Immediate parked regen; replace DPF filter if regen fails

description: Engine oil pressure - low, most severe
recommended_action: Stop vehicle; check oil level and pressure sensor; inspect oil pump
Top off coolant; pressure-test for leaks

description: Power supply voltage low - battery/charging fault
recommended_action: Load-test batteries; inspect alternator and cables

description: J1939 CAN bus - abnormal update rate
recommended_action: Inspect CAN harness and connectors; check terminating resistors

description: Trailer ABS lamp circuit - open circuit
recommended_action: Inspect ABS lamp circuit wiring and connector
Verify DEF quality; replace DEF doser if faulty
Inspect DPF for face-plugging; clean or replace filter

description: Ambient air temp sensor - voltage above normal

recommended_action: Inspect turbo speed sensor wiring; check turbocharger
